items.title: simonlin1212/Vibe-Research
items.summary: Vibe-Research: Your Personal Trading Research Agent · A股/美股/港股 的个人投研 Agent：每日复盘、资讯雷达、个股数据、板块中心、我的持仓、研究记录。Vibe-Research 把数据和功能配齐，由你自己的 AI 驱动投资研究。

items.title: AI Can't Recreate the Thrust Game (But It Can Help You Understand It)

items.title: Return on Attention: Why AI Code Reviews Are Wearing Us Out
items.summary: PR volume went up, ticket quality didn't, and the gap got filled with LLMs on both sides of the review: bots reviewing, bots replying, bots occasionally arguing with bots about priorities that only existed in a teammate's head. Our CEO named the actual problem, and it's bigger than code review.
